landing.title: Your campus, connected
landing.subtitle: Personalized for
landing.peerToPeer: Peer-to-peer listings for gadgets, furniture, notes, and everyday items — priced for students.
landing.recentlyRefreshed: Recently refreshed listings your campusmates are watching.
landing.newlyPostedPicks: Newly posted second-hand picks from your university.
landing.noListingYet: No listings yet. Be the first to sell on your campus.
landing.browseVerified: Browse verified campus stores and retail listings — separate from student Buy & Sell.
landing.foodOutlets: Food outlets and dishes from approved campus vendors — separate from general retail on Campus Mart.
landing.dishesAndItems: Dishes and items you can order.
landing.foodEmptyMenu: No menu items to show yet.
landing.bookShebaIntro: Textbooks: buy, borrow, or grab a donation
landing.bookShebaDesc: Three rails tuned to how students actually move books — paid resale, short-term lending, and community giveaways.
landing.bookShebaShortDesc: Buy textbooks and notes from students on your campus.
landing.lendListing: Lend listings for a period — ideal for a single semester.
landing.freeBooksDesc: Donated titles — pay it forward when you are done reading.
landing.recoverItems: Recover items — or help someone else
landing.lostReports: Latest lost reports and found posts from your university, refreshed as the community posts them.
landing.recentlyFoundTitle: Good samaritan finds waiting to be claimed.
landing.openRequests: Open requests are sorted with critical and high urgency first so you can respond when minutes matter.
landing.students&stuff: Students and staff who registered to help.
landing.activeNeeds: Active needs from your university community.
landing.parcelShebaIntro: Book pickup and drop-off between halls and landmarks. Track status from handover to delivery — same account as the rest of Campus Sheba.
landing.hallsDeptFoodZones: Halls, departments, food zones, and landmarks — explore what matters for your timetable and routes.
landing.securitydesks: Security desks, hospitals, ambulance, police, and fire — verified numbers for your institution.
landing.oneTapAway: Every live module — one tap away
landing.preferATraditionalDirectory: Prefer a traditional directory? Jump straight into any service; the sections above show real listings when your campus is selected.
landing.fromNightBefore: From night-before exams to sudden emergencies, Campus Sheba keeps essential tools in one trusted place — with your university at the center.
landing.mapsContactsAndMore: Maps, contacts, and listings respect your institution — not generic city results.
landing.peerPoweredText: Books, buy & sell, and blood networks grow from students helping students.
landing.weAreShippingFood: We are shipping food ordering, shop-wise selling, skill bookings, jobs, tuition matching, and sustainable waste pickup — day by day.
landing.deliveryShebaWillTieInto: Delivery Sheba will tie into the same account and campus context you use for parcels and maps — stay tuned for launch announcements.
landing.emergencyDirectories: Emergency directories and lost & found reduce friction when minutes count.
landing.evolvingText: Food, shops, jobs, and tuition tools are rolling out — your feedback shapes the roadmap.
landing.shippingFood: We are shipping food ordering, shop-wise selling, skill bookings, jobs, tuition matching, and sustainable waste pickup — day by day.
landing.feature1Text: Book tutors, designers, and fixers from your student community.
landing.feature2Text: Part-time roles, internships, and micro-gigs around your university.
landing.feature3Text: Smarter matching for courses, groups, and mentors.
landing.feature4Text: Responsible waste collection and recycling on campus.

buySellDetail.defaultDescription: Good condition item from a trusted campus seller. Contact seller for inspection or pickup details.
buySellDetail.inspectionPossible: Is inspection possible? Yes, before payment.

buySellLanding.subtitle: Campus marketplace deals - browse by featured, latest, and categories.
buySellLanding.chooseUniversityHint: Use the campus selector in the top bar to see listings.
buySellLanding.popularCategoriesSub: Jump to the category you are looking for.
buySellLanding.noCategories: No categories found for Buy & Sell.

buySellFeed.subtitle: Browse listings from your campus. Select a university in the header to load items.
buySellFeed.chooseUniversityHint: Use the campus selector in the top bar to see Buy & Sell listings for that campus.

myBuySell.title: My Buy & Sell
myBuySell.subtitle: Your listings on campus marketplace.
myBuySell.noListings: No listings yet. When you post items, they will appear here.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Balance, top-up, withdrawals, and activity
wallet.topupMin: Minimum top-up ৳10. You will be redirected to pay securely.

campusTopbar.disabledAfterLogin: University change is disabled after login

profile.unableToLoad: Unable to load profile right now.

protected.sessionExpiredHint: Please sign in again to use this page. Your university selection is unchanged.

marketplace.hubSubtitle: Shops, products, and food around your university.
marketplace.selectUniversity: Choose a university from the top bar to browse the marketplace.
marketplace.noShops: No shops found for this campus yet.
marketplace.foodHubHint: Food around your selected campus — separate from general marketplace listings.

campusMart.title: Campus Mart
campusMart.subtitle: Official shops and retail products. Preloved student listings stay on Buy & Sell.
campusMart.selectUniversityHint: Use the campus selector in the top bar to see stores and products.
campusMart.categoriesSub: Jump to a category, same pattern as Buy & Sell and Books.
campusMart.noCategories: No product categories are available yet.
campusMart.storesSub: Retail and product shops — food outlets are on the Food page.
campusMart.buySellNoteBody: Student-to-student preloved deals are on Buy & Sell. Campus Mart is for retail and shops.
campusMart.emptyShops: No stores yet for this campus.
campusMart.emptyProducts: No products to show right now.
campusMart.notBuySellBody: This is a retail listing from a campus shop. For second-hand goods between students, use Buy & Sell.

campusFood.title: Food
campusFood.subtitle: Restaurants, halls, and cafés on your campus — plus dishes you can order.
campusFood.selectUniversityHint: Use the campus selector in the top bar to see food listings.
campusFood.outletsSub: Approved food shops, restaurants, and campus dining outlets.
campusFood.emptyOutlets: No food outlets for this campus yet.
campusFood.categoriesSub: From your campus taxonomy — tap to filter menu items when linked.
campusFood.menuSub: Dishes and items listed by food outlets.
campusFood.empty: No food listings for this campus yet.
campusFood.orderNoteBody: Cart and checkout will follow the same flow as Books and Buy & Sell when enabled.

footer.newsletterSubtitle: Get updates on new campuses, features, and student offers.
footer.description: A 360° campus lifestyle super-app connecting students, educators, and service providers across Bangladesh.
footer.appDescription: Available on iOS and Android with all features accessible on the go.
footer.copyright: © {year} Campus Sheba. All rights reserved. Made with care in Bangladesh.
